strikeEvents.name: Near Khasab, Musandam Peninsula
strikeEvents.detail: Approximate waters north of Khasab where Reuters reported the sanctioned tanker Skylight was hit off Oman's Musandam peninsula.
strikeEvents.source: Reuters reported the attack near Khasab Port; map point is approximate.

strikeEvents.name: Port of Bahrain
strikeEvents.detail: Approximate port location where Reuters reported the U.S.-flagged products tanker Stena Imperative was hit by projectiles while docked.
strikeEvents.source: Reuters; illustrative port coordinate, not a claimed exact impact point.

strikeEvents.name: Duqm Commercial Port
strikeEvents.detail: Approximate Duqm port location where Reuters reported a drone hit a fuel tank and caused a fire at the commercial port.
strikeEvents.source: Reuters; approximate port coordinate used for the replay.

strikeEvents.name: Fujairah Energy Hub
strikeEvents.detail: Reuters reported a fire at Fujairah amid the wider shipping crisis. This point marks the major fuel and bunkering hub area for a visual event note.
strikeEvents.source: Reuters shipping coverage; approximate hub coordinate.

strikeEvents.name: Kermanshah
strikeEvents.detail: AP reported repeated airstrikes around Kermanshah as the regional conflict widened. This marks the city area, not a verified precise strike coordinate.
strikeEvents.source: AP live coverage; approximate city coordinate.

staticPins.name: Strait of Hormuz
staticPins.detail: Reference pin for the chokepoint around which many of the shipping incidents were reported.

staticPins.name: Bahrain
staticPins.detail: Reference pin for Bahrain in the broader regional picture.

howToUse: Add a new strike by duplicating one object in strikeEvents.
lat and lng are the target coordinates.
startLat and startLng are the origin or launch coordinates for the incoming path.
originName labels the launch point in the popup, label, and live feed.
delay controls when the event fires during replay, in milliseconds.
flightMs controls how long the incoming icon travels before impact.
labelHoldMs is optional per event, but the current JS mainly uses the global timing settings in article1.js.
zoom lets one event zoom closer or farther than the others.
pinColor changes the target marker, incoming track, and impact ring color.
icon changes the animated incoming symbol.
stamp, category, detail, and source populate the live feed and popup.
Use staticPins for extra labels that should stay on the map without replaying.

eventTemplate.name: New Target Location
eventTemplate.detail: Short event description for the feed.
